Oracle Events
OE 1: Search Linear for the invoice safety ticket using linear_list_issues (query: "invoice" OR "attachment" OR "template safety" OR "ENG-187"). Discover linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2 (ENG-187, "Invoice email template safety checks - prevent attachment mismatches"), state_backlog, assignee moveops_lena_bjorkstrom, priority 2, due_date 2026-04-18 (overdue). Retrieve full issue details with linear_get_issue.
OE 2: Read comments on the invoice safety ticket using linear_list_comments (issueId: linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2). Discover 5 comments: Lena deferral (linear_comment_77eafc95e169, Apr 6: "Leaving unassigned for now"), Samira backlog acknowledgment (linear_comment_3dfd1f1dd151, Apr 6: "keeping this in backlog is uncomfortable"), Samira manager escalation (linear_comment_f0c737166dc1, Apr 15: "Assign an owner today, define fastest shippable stopgap"), Marcus finance flag (linear_comment_948885261d6e, Apr 15: "confirmed case where QuickBooks records were correct but the invoice PDFs sent externally appear to have been mismatched"), Marcus priority escalation (linear_comment_76c40fb4953f, Apr 22: "confirmed second pricing-exposure event, requesting attachment-to-recipient verification gate or manual review checkpoint").
OE 3: Search Linear for the reconstruction issue using linear_list_issues (query: "Sunbelt" OR "Palmetto" OR "reconstruct" OR "invoice exposure"). Discover linear_issue_cd35f1ab6130 (OPS-417, "Reconstruct Sunbelt/Palmetto invoice attachment exposure and issue corrected documentation"), priority 1, assignee moveops_marcus_thorne. Retrieve full issue details with linear_get_issue to find: Sunbelt QB invoice INV-2026-0398 for $4,800, Palmetto QB invoice INV-2026-0399 for $2,400, PDFs swapped on 2026-04-10.
OE 4: Read comments on the reconstruction issue using linear_list_comments (issueId: linear_issue_cd35f1ab6130). Discover 3 dense comments: Samira engineering context (linear_comment_f462f319ec98, Apr 15: "dormant safeguard ticket, no production stopgap at time of Apr 10 batch"), David CE view (linear_comment_e923ce00f162, Apr 22: "second pricing-exposure incident, Emeka flagged overload on 4/5 and follow-up never became actual reassignment, response latency turned a correctable send error into a broader relationship problem"), Marcus finance closeout (linear_comment_496602223842, Apr 22: 4 required remediations for Palmetto audit doc, Sunbelt recovery plan, CE incident record, engineering safeguard reactivation).
OE 5: Search emails for client communications about the invoice swap using search_emails (query: "invoice" OR "INV-2026-0398" OR "INV-2026-0399" OR "Sunbelt" OR "Palmetto" OR "pricing"). Discover Raj Greenfield's initial question (email_email_348cdfd14d56: "header says Palmetto Community Foundation, total $2,400"), Raj's follow-up (email_email_60e1b29b3e36: "haven't heard back"), Raj's escalation to David (email_email_56af437dab99: "billing error or pricing discrepancy"). Discover Carmen Delgado-Reyes's Palmetto complaint (email_email_1f8e937790b9: "$4,800 does not match pricing we were quoted, May 15 audit deadline") and her follow-up (email_email_14c1d70d5b74: "cannot route this for payment until corrected"). Open full threads with get_thread.
OE 6: Search emails for Emeka's client responses using search_emails (query: "Emeka" OR "document-send error" OR "corrected invoice"). Discover Emeka's reconstruction email to Raj (email_email_b75ff17bfa19: "document-send error, not a change to Sunbelt's agreed pricing, not a new nonprofit pricing program"). Discover Emeka's response to Carmen if present. This reveals what clients have been told so far.
OE 7: Search emails for David's internal escalation about pricing pressure using search_emails (query: "David" OR "pricing exposure" OR "Victoria" OR "portfolio"). Discover David's email to Marcus, Samira, Emeka, Hana (email_email_7fe9a06077f6: "After Victoria Chen-Nakamura's note this morning about portfolio pricing for Sunbelt companies, I no longer think we should talk about the Sunbelt/Palmetto invoice mix-up as a narrow finance correction"). Discover Victoria Chen-Nakamura's escalation email (email_email_68e6dbbcc583: "portfolio-wide pricing structure available to Sunbelt-backed companies"). This is the pricing pressure David mentioned.
OE 8: Search emails for Marcus's internal closeout expectations using search_emails (query: "Marcus" OR "closeout" OR "remediation"). Discover Marcus's email specifying: Palmetto needs corrected written explanation for audit support, Sunbelt needs recovery plan now that Victoria has moved into executive territory, engineering must reactivate safeguard work with owner and date.
OE 9: Verify real invoice amounts using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria for INV-2026-0398 and INV-2026-0399) and/or quickbooks_read_invoice (with invoice IDs). Confirm: INV-2026-0398 = $4,800 (Sunbelt Venture Partners), INV-2026-0399 = $2,400 (Palmetto Community Foundation, nonprofit rate). Check if other invoices were generated on 2026-04-10 to assess batch scope. Only these two invoices have TxnDate 2026-04-10.
OE 10: Search Slack for discussions about the Sunbelt/Palmetto incident using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Sunbelt" OR "Palmetto" OR "invoice" OR "pricing exposure"). Discover David's Slack message (ts 1776931800) in C002 #customer-engagement: "second pricing-exposure incident, Emeka flagged overload on 4/5, Hana rushed the 4/10 batch, engineering had attachment-safety ticket in backlog, Sunbelt turned the exposure into a portfolio pricing conversation." Read thread replies with conversations_replies. Also discover Marcus's directive message (ts 1776957000) in C005 #finance: "hard line under this one... control failure across finance, account coverage, and product safeguards" with 3 remediation demands (finance corrected docs, CE Sunbelt recovery plan, engineering reopen safeguard).
OE 11: Search Slack and/or Linear for the Emeka overload / account capacity issue using conversations_search_messages (filter_in_channel: C006 #operations, search_query: "overload" OR "capacity" OR "Emeka") and/or linear_list_issues (query: "account coverage" OR "Emeka" OR "rebalance"). Discover linear_issue_644c3b2e75a6 ("Rebalance April account coverage for Emeka across Sunbelt, Palmetto, Axiom, and Mosaic", Apr 5). Discover Chloe's non-reassignment comment (linear_comment_6852da3486e8: "nothing clean to reassign yet"). This confirms the systemic delay: Emeka overloaded Apr 5, no reassignment, client response lag Apr 10-14.
OE 12: Look up contact details for Lena, Marcus, and Samira using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Lena Bjorkstrom" then "Marcus Thorne" then "Samira Tariq"). Confirm lena.bjorkstrom@moveops.com, marcus.thorne@moveops.com, samira.tariq@moveops.com.
OE 13: Update the invoice safety ticket (linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2) using linear_update_issue and/or linear_create_comment. Consolidated eng status covering: what finance asks (attachment-to-recipient verification gate or manual checkpoint, per Marcus Apr 22), what CE asks (log both system failure and delay failure, per David Apr 22), who needs to own implementation (Lena as original assignee or new owner), stopgap options (filename/header validation or second-person confirmation for batch sends) vs full workflow validation. Do not promise a ship date. Do not reference Terraform by name in the update if it would be visible outside engineering.
OE 14: Add a comment on the reconstruction issue (linear_issue_cd35f1ab6130) using linear_create_comment. Confirm what engineering has done (Samira acknowledged gap Apr 15, raised priority on safety ticket) and what engineering has not done (no owner assigned, no stopgap shipped, no scoping completed). Address Marcus's remediation ask for engineering specifically.
OE 15: Send email to Lena using send_email (sender: samira.tariq@moveops.com, recipients: ["lena.bjorkstrom@moveops.com"]). Specific implementation ask: reactivate ENG-187, define the fastest shippable stopgap (attachment-customer name validation before send) separately from full workflow validation, coordinate with Marcus on audit trail needs. Reference what she deferred on Apr 6 and what has happened since.
OE 16: Post summary in #engineering using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C003). Inform team that invoice safety ticket (ENG-187) is being reactivated from backlog as incident follow-up, not normal backlog work. Ticket needs an owner and a stopgap definition. Do not mention Terraform by name. Do not promise a ship date.
OE 17: Check calendar availability for Samira, Lena, and Marcus for early next week (Apr 27-29) using calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to (start_datetime: 2026-04-27, end_datetime: 2026-04-30) and/or calendar_search_events (query: "Samira" then "Lena" then "Marcus"). Discover conflicts on Monday 27: Samira standup 9:00-9:30 and sprint 14:00-15:00, Lena deep work 8:00-11:00, Marcus finance sync 9:00-10:00 and Heartland call 11:00-11:30. Monday valid windows: 11:30-14:00 (all three free) or after 15:00. Tuesday 28: Samira Elena 1:1 9:00-9:30 and interviews 11:00-12:00, Marcus board prep 9:00-10:00 and pricing review 10:30-11:30, Lena standup overflow 9:00-9:30 and pairing 11:00-12:00. Tuesday valid windows: 10:00-10:30 (tight but valid) or after 12:00 (all free). Wednesday 29: no calendar events for any of the three — fully open. Earliest available slot is Monday 11:30 AM; tightest "early" morning slot is Tuesday 10:00-10:30.
OE 18: Book the 30-minute working session using calendar_add_calendar_event (title referencing invoice safety / safeguard scoping, start_datetime: 2026-04-28 10:00:00, end_datetime: 2026-04-28 10:30:00, attendees: ["samira.tariq@moveops.com", "lena.bjorkstrom@moveops.com", "marcus.thorne@moveops.com"]).

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
